taskSummary: Record the current PR #376 home masthead image replacement and failing release-gate diagnosis after the image was replaced on the branch.
diagnosis: Release Gate failed because npm run validate reported missing trace coverage for the current date.
The release-gate log reported that branch feature/home-masthead-treatment uses feature/ and requires an audit trace.
The release-gate log reported no trace directory found at docs/agent-audit/reasoning/2026/06/09.
CI, GOV.UK page rendering, qa-bdd, Lychee and accessibility checks were already passing on the current PR head.
decisions: Added a current-date trace directory and trace duo for the material SVG replacement work on PR #376.
Did not alter the masthead SVG, Nunjucks template, generated HTML or CSS as part of this fix.
Treated the release-gate failure as a trace-coverage issue, not an image-link or rendering issue.
validationNotRun: No local npm commands were run in this session.
Validation should be confirmed by the next PR workflow run.
